message:
fix(serve): cursor boundary checks for attention endpoints

Refactor cursor expiration logic into shared helper functions:
- attentionReplayEarliestCursor: returns proper earliest cursor for empty journals
- attentionCursorExpired: centralizes expiration check with correct boundary math

Fixes edge case where empty journals could report incorrect oldest_cursor.
Adds test coverage for boundary cursor acceptance in all three attention
endpoints (events, digest, stream).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
